title: add --sign-by to bud/commit/push, --remove-signatures for pull/push
body: Add the --sign-by option to `buildah build-using-dockerfile`, `buildah commit`, `buildah push`, and `buildah manifest push`.  Add the `--remove-signatures` option to `buildah pull`, `buildah push`, and `buildah manifest push`.  We just pass them to the image library, which does all of the heavy lifting.

comments.body: CI is complaining about `./common.go:12:2: imported and not used: "github.com/sirupsen/logrus"`
@vrothberg @mheon @giuseppe @TomSweeneyRedHat Please comment on the --remove-signatures versus --nosigs or some alternative.

> @vrothberg @mheon @giuseppe @TomSweeneyRedHat Please comment on the --remove-signatures versus --nosigs or some alternative.

I believe this ship has sailed as `skopeo copy` already has a `--remove-signatures`. I would prefer the tools to have a consistent interface. But if we strongly against `--remove-signatures` we could deprecate it in Skopeo and create a new alias.

LGTM
I too don't really care for the remove-signature name, but as it's already been established in skopeo and I don't think it's too conceptually off, I think we should stick with it.
